violations.text: Several cooler gaskets located in aisles 4 & 5 was not in good repair. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

The following areas: -floors underneath shelving in aisles -some shelves in aisles -inside some coolers havw an accumnulation of food debris and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Food items (Juice and Yogurt) were observed held at 43-44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were moved to colder refrigeration at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

At the time of inspection, the Aisle 3/4 end cooler with juice and yogurts was observed to be in need of adjustment/repair. Unit was observed to be maintaining an ambient temperature of 41 to 45 degrees Fahrenheit with food items observed at 42 to 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Per the PIC, a ticket for service is to be submitted. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2025

The floor under shelving in the pet food aisle area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025
